investmentAmountInUsd.description: The amount in USD deducted from the CALLER's account balance to copy-trade this agent-portfolio. This is NOT the agent-portfolio's own balance — the agent-portfolio receives a separate fixed virtual balance (returned as agentPortfolioVirtualBalance). Positions are mirrored proportionally: e.g. $2,000 with a $10,000 virtual balance = 20% position sizing.

agentPortfolioName.description: A unique display name for the agent-portfolio (6-10 characters).

agentPortfolioDescription.description: An optional description of the agent-portfolio's purpose or strategy.

userTokenName.description: A human-readable name for the user token provisioned with the agent-portfolio.

scopeIds.description: [DEPRECATED — use scopeNames instead] The set of permission scope identifiers to grant to the provisioned user token. Available scopes: 200 = etoro-public:real:read, 201 = etoro-public:demo:read, 202 = etoro-public:real:write, 203 = etoro-public:demo:write.

scopeNames.description: The set of permission scope names (preferred; replaces the deprecated scopeIds). Provide either scopeNames or scopeIds. Available scopes: etoro-public:real:read, etoro-public:demo:read, etoro-public:real:write, etoro-public:demo:write.

ipsWhitelist.description: An optional set of IPv4 addresses allowed to use the provisioned user token.

expiresAt.description: An optional expiration date and time (UTC) for the provisioned user token.
